PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Advanced From Jun-26-09 To Jun-03-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on the courts calendar on this day having been sent from Dept 206 for a small claims appeal. The Judge, Clerk Dennis D. Vegas, Plaintif Aaron Greenspan, Defendant Colin Ward for the City and County Of San Francisco are present in court. Court and counsel argue the matter off of the record. Judgement is in favor of the defendant the City And County Of San Francisco.
